title: On Orthogonal Matrices
relevance: Original Paley construction for Hadamard matrices using quadratic residues

title: Extension of Paley Construction for Hadamard Matrix
relevance: Extended Paley constructions applicable to any odd prime power, not just q ≡ 1 mod 4

title: A database of constructions of Hadamard matrices
relevance: Comprehensive database confirming 668 is the smallest unknown order; all orders ≤ 1208 covered in SageMath
